gist.headline: Fresh in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new community app just sprouted! Check out this clean, basic image generator powered by Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added a new community-built basic image generation app to the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and use a straightforward web interface for generating images with their Pollinations API key.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee (Polly) watering a new little seedling in a greenhouse. The seedling has a tiny picture frame growing out of it, representing the new image generation app. Cozy, warm, nurturing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a glowing seedling in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. The seedling is sprouting a tiny picture frame showing a landscape. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
